---
title: '`r paste(emojifont::emoji("card_file_box"),
        "Data Product Development")`'
description: |
  Data products are any product that involves ingesting, processing, or 
  presenting data with the purpose of presenting insight or making automated
  decisions in a way that goes beyond the meaning of the raw data.
author:
  - name: TJ Palanca
    url: https://www.twitter.com/tjpalanca
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---

## User Experience (UX) in Data Products

> If you want people to do the right thing, make it easy.

Remember that the main goal of your data product users is typically not the
extraction of meaning from the data; it is to harness the power of data to solve
the problem that they are really trying to solve. Therefore, it may be tempting
to assume that people will use your data product in exactly the way you think
it was designed to be used.

This cannot be left to chance. If you require that users do the "right" thing or
use your app properly, then you must make that the easiest thing to do in light
of their "jobs to be done".
